feat.name: Tripartite Omen
feat.text: You invoke religious portents to ward yourself against danger without losing sight of the history that led to this point. When you use Dualistic Synergy, if your next action is to Cast a Spell from your spell slots and that spell is divine, you gain a +1 status bonus to AC for 1 round. If the spell is a halcyon spell, you gain this benefit in addition to the benefits described in Dualistic Synergy.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
